---
name: 'agileagentcanvas-bmad-to-json'
description: 'Convert BMAD Markdown artifacts to schema-compliant verbose JSON format. Supports single file, batch, and filtered conversion.'
---

In all BMAD resource files, the template variable {bmad-path} resolves to: /Users/sebicas/.vscode/extensions/msayedshokry.agileagentcanvas-0.4.1/resources/_aac
The template variable {project-root} refers to the workspace/project root directory.

IT IS CRITICAL THAT YOU FOLLOW THIS COMMAND: LOAD the FULL /Users/sebicas/.vscode/extensions/msayedshokry.agileagentcanvas-0.4.1/resources/_aac/core/workflows/convert-to-json/workflow.md, READ its entire contents and follow its directions exactly!
